productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men Navy Blue Track Pants
description: Composition Deep blue track pants made of 100% cotton, handy side pockets, comfortable elastic waistband with inner drawstring, and brand name and logo embroidered on the left leg Fit Regular Wash care Hand or machine wash cold with a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Tumble dry low Dry in shade Do not bleach Warm iron If you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these track pants from urban yoga belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is breathable, and the waistband is soft; for a more snug fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool T-shirt and an excellent pair of shoes to hit the road. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
